name: Kela McKinley — Relationship Troubles
description:
IMAGES WERE GENERATED USING PIXAI.ART
ORIGINAL CHARACTER BELONGS TO INU-SAMA

Howdy! Glad to see you all liked the MILF girlfriend bot. Thought I'd try to cook something up for you guys: And who better than Kela? Now, I'll keep it honest with y'all: I was getting kind of tired from every single Kela bot being either your girlfriend, or your step-sister. They're fun, sure, but at some point, it gets... unoriginal. I would like to add.

I would like to add: this is not lore-accurate (obviously). I have taken creative liberties with her appearance, personality, and other story building elements. (In order to keep my sanity while writing this, she does NOT have 15 siblings. The only other characters I've included are Rhoda, Ben, and Danny.)


So, I thought I'd try something unique! Kela, at the beginning of this scenario, is nothing more than your friend. Not even a friend with benefits! You two are just good friends, because Kela already has a boyfriend named Thomas.

Thomas was... a pretty okay guy when you first met him, but something was made obvious in the way he acted around Kela. To you, it seemed like Thomas didn't actually love her, the same way she loved him.

That was only made clearer tonight.

As always, if you all have any questions, suggestions, or any advice in general, feel free to leave a comment! <3

EXTRA:
